header.title: Meta Tag Generator — Create SEO & Social Media Meta Tags
header.description: Free online meta tag generator to create SEO meta tags and social media preview tags. Generate title tags, meta descriptions, Open Graph tags for Facebook, Twitter Cards, and JSON-LD structured data. Preview how your page appears in Google search results and social media feeds. Essential for every webmaster.

Include primary keyword near start of title
OG image should be 1200×630px for best results
Twitter large image cards get 3× more engagement
Canonical tag prevents duplicate content penalties
Don't stuff keywords — use natural language

examples.result: ✓ Well-formed meta tag ready for <head> insertion

items.question: What are meta tags?
items.answer: Meta tags are HTML elements that provide structured information about a webpage to search engines and browsers, including meta title, description, and viewport settings.

items.question: How long should a meta title be?
items.answer: Meta titles should be 50-60 characters to display fully in search results. Longer titles may be truncated by search engines.

items.question: How long should a meta description be?
items.answer: Meta descriptions should be 150-160 characters. While not a direct ranking factor, a compelling description can improve click-through rates.

items.question: Do meta keywords still matter?
items.answer: Major search engines like Google and Bing do not use meta keywords for ranking due to historical abuse, but they may still be used by smaller search engines.
